zh.lifeSummary: 當Ailin Dunkeld Mac Muredoch Of Mormaer於1134年出生在英國蘇格蘭特拉爾 斯科特蘭加根諾可時，他的父親Alwin Mac Muredach Mac Maidouern - First Earl of Lennox30歲，母親Oge Dunkeld29歲。他和Eva de Menteith至少有8個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於大約1216年在他的家鄉享年83歲。

nameMeanings.name: Mac
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Cuong, Minh, Lien, Muoi, Thanh, Tho, Tieu, Vinh, Anh, Beo, Binh, Chau.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 麥 (see   Mai   2) and 莫 (see   Mo   1).
Vietnamese (Mạc): from Chinese 莫 ‘nothing; nonexistent’; see Mo 1.

variants.name: Mai
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Thanh, Hoa, Son, Dung, Long, Binh, Minh, Thu, Hue, Huong, Thuy.  Chinese Chi, Hong, Ho, Sang, Han, Hang, Jian, Li, Man, Mei, Sen, Wei.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 麥, meaning ‘wheat’ in Chinese: (i) from Mai Qiu (麥丘), the title of a man in the state of Qi (located mainly in present-day Shandong province) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), who, despite being very old, came to celebrate the birthday of the Duke Huan of Qi (ruler of the state of Qi, died 643  BC ). His descendants inherited 麥, the first part of his title, as their surname. (ii) borne by descendants of Mai Tie Zhang (麥鐵杖), a famous general during the Sui dynasty (581–618  AD ). His descendants were scattered around southern China.

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 買, meaning ‘buy’ in Chinese: (i) borne by descendants of the king Song Weizi, founder of the state of Song. (ii) borne by descendants of the Duke Dao of Xu (ruler of the state of Xu, 546–523  BC ), possibly inheriting his personal name. (iii) from the first element of the personal name Mai Zhu Chu (買朱鉏), style name of an official who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (iv) it has also been traced back to other ethnic groups in northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Muredoch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: from an Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal names Muireadhach ‘mariner’, Murchadh ‘sea-warrior’, and Muircheartach ‘sea-ruler’, the first element in each being muir ‘sea’. The personal name was introduced into Yorkshire and Normandy by Norsemen from Ireland as early as the 10th century. The surname in post-Conquest medieval England usually belongs to Norman families.

variants.name: Murdough
meanings: Scottish and Irish: variant of   Murdoch  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Murdock
meanings: Scottish and Irish: variant of Scottish   Murdoch  .

variants.name: McMurray
meanings: Irish (northern) and Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Muireadhaigh or Mac Muireadhaich, a patronymic from the personal name Muireadhach ‘seafarer’ (see Murdoch ). Compare McCurry 1.

variants.name: Murdy
meanings: Scottish and Irish: variant of   Murdoch  , and possibly also a shortened form of   McMurdie  .

nameMeanings.name: Ailin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Dunkeld
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: nickname from Middle Low German dunkel, a byform of dunker ‘dark, conceited, unclear’, also applied as a byname for a blind person. Compare Dunckel and Dunkle .

en.lifeSummary: When Ailin Dunkeld Mac Muredoch Of Mormaer was born in 1134, in Gargunnock, Central Scotland, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Alwin Mac Muredach Mac Maidouern - First Earl of Lennox, was 30 and his mother, Oge Dunkeld, was 29. He had at least 8 sons and 1 daughter with Eva de Menteith. He died about 1216, in his hometown, at the age of 83.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ailin Dunkeld Mac Muredoch Of Mormaer est né en 1134, à Gargunnock, Central Scotland, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Alwin Mac Muredach Mac Maidouern - First Earl of Lennox, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Oge Dunkeld, avait 29 ans. Il a eu au moins 8 fils et 1 fille avec Eva de Menteith. Il est décédé environ 1216, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 83 ans.

Er hatte mit Eva de Menteith mindestens 8 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1216 im Alter von 83 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

ja.lifeSummary: Ailin Dunkeld Mac Muredoch Of Mormaerが1134年にイギリススコットランドセントラル スコトランドガーグノックで生まれた時，父Alwin Mac Muredach Mac Maidouern - First Earl of Lennoxは30歳，母Oge Dunkeldは29歳であった。彼はEva de Menteithとの間に少なくとも8人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1216年に故郷で83歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ailin Dunkeld Mac Muredoch Of Mormaer(이)가 1134년 영국 스코틀랜드 세트럴 스컷랜드 가건옥크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alwin Mac Muredach Mac Maidouern - First Earl of Lennox(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Oge Dunkeld(은)는 29세였다. 그는 Eva de Menteith(와)과 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1216년 그의 고향에서 83세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ailin Dunkeld Mac Muredoch Of Mormaer родился в 1134 г. в местности гаргуннокк, кентраль скотланд, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Alwin Mac Muredach Mac Maidouern - First Earl of Lennox было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Oge Dunkeld, 29. У него было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 1 дочь от Eva de Menteith. Он умер около 1216 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 83 лет.
